properties.name: openflags.provider
properties.description: The flag provider type to use. Supported: 'file', 'remote', 'hybrid'.

properties.name: openflags.file.path
properties.description: Path to the flag definition file. Supports classpath: and file: prefixes.

properties.name: openflags.file.watch-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable hot reload when the flag file changes. Automatically disabled for files inside JARs.

properties.name: openflags.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Enable Micrometer metrics. Requires micrometer-core in classpath and a MeterRegistry bean.

properties.name: openflags.metrics.tag-flag-key
properties.description: If true, the 'flag' tag is added to per-flag counters and timers. Disable to reduce cardinality when N > 200 flags.

properties.name: openflags.metrics.tags
properties.description: Static tags applied to all openflags metrics.

properties.name: openflags.audit.mdc-enabled
properties.description: If true, sets 'openflags.flag_key' and 'openflags.targeting_key' in SLF4J MDC during evaluation. WARNING: targeting key may contain PII.

properties.name: openflags.remote.failure-threshold
properties.description: Consecutive remote poll failures before exponential backoff kicks in.

properties.name: openflags.remote.max-backoff
properties.description: Upper bound for the backoff delay applied when the circuit is open.

properties.name: openflags.remote.flags-path
properties.description: Path appended to the base URL for fetching flags. Defaults to '/flags'.

properties.name: openflags.remote.auth-header-name
properties.description: HTTP header name for authentication, e.g. 'X-API-Key'. May be null.

properties.name: openflags.remote.auth-header-value
properties.description: HTTP header value for authentication. May be null if auth-header-name is null.

properties.name: openflags.remote.cache-ttl
properties.description: Cache TTL. Default: 5 minutes. Must be greater than or equal to poll-interval.

properties.name: openflags.remote.connect-timeout
properties.description: HTTP connect timeout. Default: 5 seconds.

properties.name: openflags.remote.request-timeout
properties.description: HTTP request timeout. Default: 10 seconds.

properties.name: openflags.remote.poll-interval
properties.description: Polling interval. Default: 30 seconds. Minimum: 5 seconds.

properties.name: openflags.remote.user-agent
properties.description: User-Agent header value. Defaults to 'openflags-java' when null or blank.

properties.name: openflags.remote.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the remote flags backend. Required when provider=remote or hybrid.

properties.name: openflags.hybrid.snapshot-path
properties.description: Filesystem path of the local snapshot file. Required when provider=hybrid.

properties.name: openflags.hybrid.snapshot-format
properties.description: Snapshot format: JSON (default) or YAML.

properties.name: openflags.hybrid.watch-snapshot
properties.description: Enable filesystem watching of the snapshot for manual edits.

properties.name: openflags.hybrid.snapshot-debounce
properties.description: Debounce window for ignoring self-induced file events.

properties.name: openflags.hybrid.fail-if-no-fallback
properties.description: If true, fail initialization when neither remote nor snapshot can produce data.
